toast.source: Toast group Daily Performance Summary email ('The Brewhouse Santa Barbara Group - Friday, June 19'), arrived Sat Jun 20 ~6:26 AM PT. Figures from the email body (All Locations = single location 229 W Montecito). Same-morning group email does NOT carry same-day-last-week / 4-wk comparison columns, labor $, void $, or discount $ -- those arrive with the detailed '229 West Montecito Street' summary ~1 day later.

Card payments 168, 0 open orders, auto-clocked-out: None. Order type: 20 takeout ($140.25), 2 dine-in ($12.00), 0 delivery. laborCost ($1,124.17) and discounts ($163.48) are DERIVED from the percentages; void $, same-day-last-week & 4-wk comparison columns are not in the same-morning group email -- they land with the detailed 229 W Montecito summary ~tomorrow.
